issues: Tunnel returns HTTP 403 host_not_allowed — cloudflared IS running (TLS handshake completes, 403 returned) but Cloudflare is blocking this cloud IP/host.
4th consecutive down run (previous: 21:12Z, 20:13Z, 19:12Z 2026-05-18).
KEY FINDING: machine appears ONLINE — prior runs misidentified as dead machine. The 403 is a Cloudflare Access policy blocking cloud-agent IPs, not a downed server.
api-url.json last updated 14:06Z — tunnel URL unchanged for 8+ hours, consistent with tunnel staying alive (not restarting).
Cannot access /api/board, /api/command, /api/status — all blocked by same Cloudflare policy.
Recommended fix: run on server: cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8080 --no-autoupdate (fresh URL may not have Access policy) OR disable CF Access for this tunnel in Cloudflare dashboard.

static_analysis.cloudflared_status: Process RUNNING — 403 host_not_allowed from Cloudflare edge, not connection-refused from dead machine
